inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 OCF $1,775M minus capital expenditures and capitalized software $229M divided by ~99M weighted-average diluted shares (10-K FY2025 MD&A liquidity section)
inputs.shares_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.dividend_source: Board approved $0.96 quarterly dividend ($3.84 annualized) February 2026 (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses FY2025 filed owner cash. FY2024 included $1.0B goodwill impairment (TRANZACT-related) and $409M transaction/transformation costs; FY2025 normalized with organic revenue +5% and transaction costs down to $23M. TRANZACT divestiture (Dec 2024) reduced reported HWC revenue but organic growth remains positive.

bear.notes: P&C soft market; broking commissions flat

bull.notes: Hard market + Newfront synergies; buybacks continue

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light advisory/brokerage; goodwill $10B+ reflects acquisitions but no land/NAV misstatement (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: HWC and R&B both profitable; HWC segment OI $1.7B, R&B $1.1B FY2025 (10-K segment note)

option_scan.question: Backlog / deferred revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Deferred revenue and accrued liabilities $2.1B; benefits outsourcing contracts convert through revenue over time (10-K balance sheet)

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Willis Re earnout $750M received H1 2025 from 2021 divestiture; non-recurring cash, not recurring FCF (10-K Note 3)

growth_explanation.mechanism: Organic revenue +5% FY2025 driven by International Health double-digit growth, Retirement/Investments in Wealth, and R&B specialties broking; partially offset by TRANZACT divestiture on reported revenue
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Organic revenue growth falls below 2% for two consecutive years as P&C market softens
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Organic revenue sustains above 6% with R&B operating leverage and Newfront integration accretive

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
